item.title: Cow Pen Murder, Red Cross Decentralize, Homelessness
item.ns0:title: Cow Pen Murder, Red Cross Decentralize, Homelessness
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, a community is left in shock following a brazen daylight shooting on Cowpen Road that has police searching for answers. We explore a major shift in disaster response as the Red Cross moves to decentralize operations across the Family Islands, and we bring you the latest on regional efforts to assist a neighbor in the wake of devastating earthquakes. Plus, residents in one flood-prone neighborhood get long-awaited news on a multi-million dollar drainage project, while we take you inside the inspiring journey of one of the country's hottest DJs.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, a community is left in shock following a brazen daylight shooting on Cowpen Road that has police searching for answers. We explore a major shift in disaster response as the Red Cross moves to decentralize operations across the Family Islands, and we bring you the latest on regional efforts to assist a neighbor in the wake of devastating earthquakes. Plus, residents in one flood-prone neighborhood get long-awaited news on a multi-million dollar drainage project, while we take you inside the inspiring journey of one of the country's hottest DJs.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, a community is left in shock following a brazen daylight shooting on Cowpen Road that has police searching for answers. We explore a major shift in disaster response as the Red Cross moves to decentralize operations across the Family Islands, and we bring you the latest on regional efforts to assist a neighbor in the wake of devastating earthquakes. Plus, residents in one flood-prone neighborhood get long-awaited news on a multi-million dollar drainage project, while we take you inside the inspiring journey of one of the country's hottest DJs.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
